case_title: KINAHAN, PAUL VS BODE GRAVEL CO. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KINAHAN, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT BODE GRAVEL CO. GUIDRY, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KINAHAN, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BODE GRAVEL CO. GUIDRY, JAMES $616.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $631.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BODE GRAVEL CO. GUIDRY, JAMES
